message:
test(fuzz): fcp-crypto to_deterministic_cbor + canonicalize (21jxh)

Add fuzz_to_deterministic_cbor covering fcp_crypto::canonicalize
to_deterministic_cbor + to_deterministic_cbor_with_capacity
(canonicalize.rs:81-105). fcp_cbor::to_canonical_cbor has its own
fuzz, but the fcp_crypto::canonicalize pathway has its own
canonicalize_value_in_place implementation driving Signable::signing_bytes
and quorum signing — divergence between the two would split the
canonical form across signing and content-addressing paths.
Properties: determinism, capacity-prealloc agreement, idempotence
under encode∘decode∘encode, tag rejection for ciborium::value::Value::Tag,
NaN/+∞/-∞ rejection, map-key sort independent of insertion order.
Once-gated anchors verify each rejection branch + capacity-prealloc
agreement on a fixed map + reversed-insertion canonical equality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1049,5 +1049,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_to_deterministic_cbor"
+path = "fuzz_targets/to_deterministic_cbor.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
